description: Ensure CHANGELOG.md is updated with every commit — blocks commits if changelog is missing or unchanged

_scripts.changelog-update.sh:
#!/bin/bash

# Check if this is a git commit command
COMMAND=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty')

if [[ "$COMMAND" != *"git commit"* ]]; then
  exit 0
fi

# Skip merge commits and amends
if [[ "$COMMAND" == *"--amend"* ]] || [[ "$COMMAND" == *"merge"* ]]; then
  exit 0
fi

# Check if CHANGELOG.md exists
if [ ! -f "CHANGELOG.md" ]; then
  echo ""
  echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
  echo "📋 CHANGELOG REQUIRED: No CHANGELOG.md found in this project"
  echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
  echo ""
  echo "Please create a CHANGELOG.md before committing. Use this format:"
  echo ""
  echo "  # Changelog"
  echo ""
  echo "  ## [Unreleased]"
  echo ""
  echo "  ### Added"
  echo "  - Description of what was added"
  echo ""
  echo "  ### Changed"
  echo "  - Description of what changed"
  echo ""
  echo "  ### Fixed"
  echo "  - Description of what was fixed"
  echo ""
  echo "Categories: Added, Changed, Deprecated, Removed, Fixed, Security"
  echo "Reference: https://keepachangelog.com"
  echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
  exit 1
fi

# Check if CHANGELOG.md is staged for this commit
STAGED_FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null)

if echo "$STAGED_FILES" | grep -q "^CHANGELOG.md$"; then
  # CHANGELOG.md is staged — all good
  exit 0
fi

# CHANGELOG.md exists but is not staged — check if it was modified but not staged
UNSTAGED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null)
if echo "$UNSTAGED" | grep -q "^CHANGELOG.md$"; then
  echo ""
  echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
  echo "📋 CHANGELOG NOT STAGED: CHANGELOG.md has changes but is not staged"
  echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
  echo ""
  echo "CHANGELOG.md was modified but not added to this commit."
  echo "Please stage it before committing:"
  echo ""
  echo "  git add CHANGELOG.md"
  echo ""
  echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
  exit 1
fi

# CHANGELOG.md exists but has no changes — it wasn't updated for this commit
echo ""
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "📋 CHANGELOG UPDATE REQUIRED"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo ""
echo "CHANGELOG.md was not updated for this commit."
echo ""

# Show what's being committed to help write the changelog entry
echo "Staged changes in this commit:"
git diff --cached --stat 2>/dev/null
echo ""

# Extract the commit message from the command if possible
COMMIT_MSG=$(echo "$COMMAND" | grep -oP '(?<=-m\s[\''\''"]).*?(?=[\''\''"])' 2>/dev/null || echo "$COMMAND" | grep -oP '(?<=-m )\S+' 2>/dev/null || echo '')

echo "Please update CHANGELOG.md under the [Unreleased] section."
echo "Use the appropriate category:"
echo ""
echo "  ### Added      — new features"
echo "  ### Changed    — changes to existing functionality"
echo "  ### Deprecated — features being removed soon"
echo "  ### Removed    — features that were removed"
echo "  ### Fixed      — bug fixes"
echo "  ### Security   — vulnerability fixes"
echo ""
echo "Then stage and include it in the commit:"
echo ""
echo "  git add CHANGELOG.md"
echo ""
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
exit 1

_usage.install: Copy scripts/changelog-update.sh to your project or ~/.claude/scripts/
_usage.configure: Add this hook configuration to your ~/.claude/settings.json or .claude/settings.json
_usage.note: This hook triggers before every git commit and blocks it if CHANGELOG.md is missing, not updated, or not staged. It skips merge commits and amends.
